title: (Bearish Signal) PTGX, enters Downtrend as Momentum indicator drops below 0 level on Mar 23, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This indicator may be signaling that PTGX's price has further to drop, since it fell below its price logged 14 days ago. Traders may consider selling the stock, shorting the stock, or exploring put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested 72 similar cases where PTGX's Momentum Indicator fell below the 0 level, and 64 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 89%. Current price $28.61 is above $27.02 the highest resistance line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 02/19/21 - 03/23/21, the price experienced a +13% Uptrend, while the week of 03/16/21 - 03/23/21 shows a -4% Downtrend.

https://preview.redd.it/mpn4l70z30p61.png?width=1529&format=png&auto=webp&s=a8ba7c68e98d4520347acf8893ff9ff97ddd5416

**Bearish Trend Analysis**

The Stochastic Indicator may be shifting from an upward trend to a downward trend. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 39 of 49 cases where PTGX's Stochastic Oscillator exited the overbought zone, the price fell further within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 80%.

The Momentum Indicator moved below the 0 level on March 23, 2021. You may want to consider selling the stock, shorting the stock, or exploring put options on PTGX as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 64 of 72 cases where the Momentum Indicator fell below 0, the stock fell further within the subsequent month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 89%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram (MACD) for PTGX turned negative on March 18, 2021. This could be a sign that the stock is set to turn lower in the coming weeks. Traders may want to sell the stock or buy put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked at 41 similar instances when the indicator turned negative. In 34 of the 41 cases the stock turned lower in the days that followed. This puts the odds of success at 83%.

Following a 3-day decline, the stock is projected to fall further. Considering past instances where PTGX declined for three days, the price rose further in 50 of 62 cases within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 82%.

PTGX broke above its upper Bollinger Band on March 02, 2021. This could be a sign that the stock is set to drop as the stock moves back below the upper band and toward the middle band. You may want to consider selling the stock or exploring put options.
